scene_title: Jovem brasileiro pesquisa UFO na madrugada
narrative_beat: Silhueta jovem brasileira diante de tela noturna com grafico carmesim-dourado ascendente

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: silhouette of a young Brazilian person at a computer desk late at night, face dimly lit by the screen glow
subject.focal_point: the screen foreground showing an ascending crimson-gold wave graph representing Google search trends
subject.secondary: An open notebook with handwritten notes lies on the desk. The room itself is in black-and-white monochrome.
props: computer monitor with ascending trend graph

environment.location: modest Brazilian bedroom with simple desk

composition.rule: rule of thirds with figure on left
composition.foreground: ascending graph on screen in rich crimson-gold tones

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
faces hidden in shadow or turned away

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
